priceNote: The 500.00 Birr pass card membership fee will be donated to the Samrawit Foundation Charitable Endowment.

programs.name: Strength Track
programs.desc: Barbell progressions with weekly performance tracking and coaching feedback.

programs.name: Hybrid Conditioning
programs.desc: Engine-building sessions that mix cardio, sled work, and functional strength.

programs.name: Recovery Flow
programs.desc: Mobility classes, breathwork, and guided stretching for longevity.

programs.name: Athlete Performance
programs.desc: Power, speed, and agility for sport-specific results.

coaches.name: Kidus Mulgeta
coaches.bio: 10+ years coaching strength athletes and general population clients.
coaches.exp: Focus: Maximum strength, clean technique, injury-proof mechanics.

coaches.name: Eskinder Worku
coaches.bio: Hybrid endurance specialist with a focus on sustainable intensity.
coaches.exp: Focus: Engine building, athletic conditioning, interval systems.

coaches.name: Niah Hassen
coaches.bio: Movement coach helping members improve range and reduce pain.
coaches.exp: Focus: Mobility systems, tissue care, pre-hab and post-hab.

machines.name: Apex Power Rack
machines.desc: Heavy-duty rack for squats, bench, and pull-ups.
machines.tip: Brace your core before every rep.

machines.name: Vector Cable Station
machines.desc: Dual-stack cables for full-range strength work.

machines.name: Storm Air Bike
machines.tip: Push and pull together for max output.

machines.name: Precision Leg Press
machines.desc: 45-degree sled with smooth rails and oversized footplate.

machines.name: Crossover Fly Station
machines.desc: Adjustable fly station for chest and shoulder isolation.
machines.tip: Keep elbows soft through the arc.

machines.name: Functional Trainer Pro
machines.desc: Versatile cable unit for full-body training.
machines.tip: Control the negative on every rep.

machines.name: Power Rack Elite
machines.desc: Heavy rack for max strength and safe spotting.
machines.tip: Set safety pins before lifting heavy.

machines.name: Hydro Row Elite
machines.tip: Drive with legs, finish with arms.

machines.name: Pulse Sled Track
machines.desc: Turf lane for sled pushes and pulls.
machines.tip: Stay low and drive through the floor.
